star_1.text: I would give higher if the ads weren't so annoying. Firstly, you are allowed to choose to watch an ad to continue a run if you fail. However, even if you press the decline button, it almost always plays the ad anyway. Secondly, I have watched ads a few times to continue, and sometimes it will bug out and not respawn you even after the ad. This game used to be better, and I loved playing it. Unless it gets fixed, I cannot recommend it.

I gave this app a 1-star rating in the hopes I would get the Developer's attention. I started playing this game in 2012. I used to play with a group of friends where we would screen shot scores in a group chat if we beat the latest high score. We'd play for hours after work...sometimes sitting at the bar we'd play. Anyway, I love this game. What I hate is what the Developer has done to the app. They added ads after EVERY game. As a business woman I totally understand the need for doing that but playing an ad after every single game is quite ridiculous. I can't play more than 5 games without rage quitting because I'm so annoyed by the ads. Can you please offer a version I can buy so I don't have to deal with the ads? If not, can you lessen the number of ads because how you have it now...I just can't recommend this app.

I came back to this app just recently after about a year and a half of not playing, and I'm sad to say that the once beloved app I enjoyed as a child has been plagued with ads. There is absolutely no reason to see an ad EVERY time you lose a run! Even when given a choies to watch an ad to continue a run and you decline, guess what! You get one anyway!! For the over 8 years that i've been playing this game (on apple and android), I could play uninterupted, ad free; but not anymore.

I used to love this game and was thrilled to see it still existed, until I played it. They've added a ridiculous amount of ads, and have added a function where you can watch an ad to continue running. This would be fine, HOWEVER, because of this, the game simply will not allow you to use resurrection wings AT ALL. My guess is because if they let people use them, they get less ad revenue, BUT WHY STILL HAVE THEM AVAILABLE FOR PURCHASE? You just waste your in-game currency on them!!

I love this game. It's fun to play but I miss the original when there weren't a bunch of ads. I understand maybe having a few here and there, but it's so riddled with ads now it ruins the game. If you die, watch an ad to continue, if you don't want to continue, you have to watch an ad anyways to get back to the menu, and that's every time. It's exhausting having to watch a 30 second ad every time you die. Please add the option to buy out of having to watch any ads.

If you want a reflection of the world, look no further than temple run. This game was once flawless, perfect, and then greed took over. This isn't a new app that needs to pay for itself, it's been around for well over a decade but they have to squeeze every penny out. Die - Ad. Running - Banner ad. Wanna revive? - Ad. Wanna do another run - Ad. I'll remember you as you were before greed ran through your blood, temple run, but this is the end for us, old friend.

The bottom of a pyramid scheme of in-game advertising other games which hook you on a daily grind and in game purchases and most likely loot boxes. This used to be fun and the ads harmless, no longer. The ads for the other games are all but impossible to avoid installing via play. Viruses, spyware and mobile banking screen recording here we come.

I'm certain that they removed swipe controls over the years. I want to lay in bed on my side and use my thumb to play the game... not my wrist! Give us swipe controls back. No one asked for this. I can't play this game because of this default gyro controls. Give us the option between swipe or gyro at least.

I installed it for a nostalgic experience but was disappointed with a few updates earlier the character used to run on a suspended path up in the sky and after a 100m rush we used to slide from a rope, and this used to repeat but now no such thing is present. My inner child is disappointed.💔
watch an ad to continue? no -> plays an ad anyway. every time. You would have to pay to remove the base ads, and then there are still the other ads too! not the same game I once loved

This game was my childhood. I used to think that this was so freaking cool . I decided to install it after so long having high expectations from it but I'm really really disappointed. Like everything is just off. In the old version there was one massive beast chasing us and now we have multiple small beasts chasing us. The graphics, the animations , the character design, the overall game settings was far better in the old version. You're supposed to improve with time. Do better.

Way too many ads!! I understand that you can pay for no ads. But the fact that there is an ad everytime you die, even if you have just watched one and then suddenly died again... That's a bit excessive!! Ridiculous! I really don't mind watching the ads normally but this is far too much. I used to play this game years ago and it never had that many. I'm deleting it.

this game used to be fun. now the ads are annoying. you cannot easily ir quickly bypass ads as in other games. you have to stay on the ad for an unmeasurable amount of time. no x in corner. I honestly don't even know how I exited the ad because there were no buttons. anything I clicked changed the screen to Google play store to download th advertised game. that happened like 6 times. did 2 runs and un-installed. ads are unbearable. used to love this game though.

Years after years after uninstalling this app. I decided to Reinstall it due to the Nostalgic memories of playing this game in my phone since I was a kid. I wasn't happy due to the updates. The graphics decreased and the revive boosts do nothing! Don't get me started on the ads! They are ridiculous, back then, there were no ads. The only thing that is understandable about the new update is when you read an ad after dying to get revived. But if you decline, you still get a 30 sec ad (or more!)
after every run u see ads in this game.I am very disappointed to this bustard game.

This game was my childhood and i downloaded it to relive those days, but I'm utterly disappointed with how everything has changed, the ads aren't even a problem, I can just turn off my wifi but everything else has definitely changed, like, the game had one beast and now there are multiple tiny ones. The game would start off by jumping with a rope line,there were multiple scene changes. Like you'd even run in water when played for long but now it's just two-three same patterns repeating. Boring.
I don't like it because the speed limit is very high 😒

As someone that used to play this game on the IPod when I was just a child, I hate how you've carried this game throughout the years, there used to be ZERO ads, and I get that you have to make money, but seriously? An ad after every single playthrough whether I get a 2 million points run, or die on the first jump, and now you can get power ups from ads as well? I'm disappointed that my childhood game has been ruined.

Failed a run and it asked me if I wanted to watch an ad to continue. I hit no and it showed me an ad anyway. Intrusive ads are conterproductive because i will go out of my way to not buy a product featured in an ad. I miss the days were this game was good and had no ads. It used to be a great toilet game. Not everything has to be attached to the internet and squeeze money out users.

back then the app was so good it's been years so i decided to download it again and the art style is not great at all nor the graphics and why has the jungle structure and has changed and the settings is not as same as before so its hard to figure how to change the character

star_2.text: I used to play this game when I was younger, and I remember it have a river scene as well as sliding on a rope. Miss those. Did they fully remove it. Also, the ads are rather annoying. Even when I click skip ads, it still plays it every single time I die. Overall, I enjoy the game. I do wish they will bring back some of the old features & lower the ads

Downloaded again for the sake of nostalgia, and I'm glad I did because I forgot how much fun and addicting it was. I'm the type of person that tries to complete all the objectives but for some reason even after buying resurrects in the stat store...there's no way to use them, no button on the screen or anything. I thought I remembered that in the past. Ads can resurrect you but doesn't complete the objective.

i used to absolutely adore this game, but after redownloading, the ads are out of control. it asks if you want to watch an ad to continue when you die, fine, but then without permission it plays one between every single run, with sound that pauses my music. really, really annoying and intrusive for what should be a fun game in my idle time. they're long and obnoxious, too - 30 second diaper ad with a newborn screaming in my ears to play temple run??? no thanks!

temple run is my all time favorite phone game. I would play it for hours and unlocked all sorts of cool characters! so I decided to re-download it after years and was happy- it's exactly like it was! EXCEPT at the end of a run, when I am asked "watch an ad to continue run?" and I choose not to, it still makes me watch an ad!!! an ad after every run! so annoying, games and ads these days. maybe after every 5 runs or don't ask me yes or no then play one anyway 😭 I miss when games were just games.

this game was my favourite....after a long time I downloaded it today to play and it took me by surprise to see the format and graphics so changed. the old version was way better and cool. you were supposed to improve with time. not make the game so off

somehow the animation has gotten worse in the last ten years. also dont know if this is how it always was but you now have to tilt your phone to move lanes which is very irritating. once i died it gave me the option to watch an add (normal) but when i clicked no it made me watch an add anyway, after that i clicked the no ad button to see how much it was and the Google pay tab came up and said click to confirm payment ? just came to play a nostalgic app disappointing how much it's changed :/
very bad as compare other game like subway surfers in which toch time and action so quick and in temple run bad toch time and rotation speed

Temple Run was a very good game. I enjoyed it a long time ago when it had a lot more diverse features like gem boxes, swimming in river, rope running, etc. Now all the interesting challenges are gone. Can't be running for more coins only. The ads are too are too invasive. And the speed can't be controlled anymore. The game is a shadow of its former self. Currently not enjoyable as before.

Very likeable, fun until It has been kept the same style for what is obviously a long while. temple run 2 and it's toy town theme are tough going, so I tried DL of Temple run 1 but it hasn't impressed. be fun if temple run 1 had more variety

It's crazy with the ads now taking the pleasure out... A truly awesome game fun and fast and very addicting. Play for hours without getting bored. 2024 Update . Tried playing again after 5-6 years... Ads are even worse. You die, have to watch an ad. And can't even get back to where you left off. Ridiculous! Uninstalling! Should be a way to be rid of the ads.

Wanted to play this game again as I used to love playing this and I had some time to kill. The graphics are somehow worse that when I was younger, so bad that you can't always tell if you need to jump or slip until it's too late making it frustrating to play. The amount of adds is also really annoying. I understand why adds are there but after every single game... Considering that graphics make it difficult to do a long run it means I'm watching an add every 2 minutes. Dissapointed.

This game is good and the idea of trying to escape from creepy giant apes is awesome! Overall however, I didn't enjoy playing it, and to be honest it doesn't really keep my attention, it isn't something I'd wanna keep because I feel its not interesting enough and the disadvantage to it is the many ads that come up after every run! It's so annoying! I'd recommend this game to someone who has nothing else to do but resort in mediocrity gameplay if they couldn't find anything better to install.

It's a great game, I've gotta put out there. But the ads. They're uncontrollable. Like literally, I turned off my internet and ads SOMEHOW continue. When you start, there aren't that many but long ads will appear after you die and die and die. Now the worst part is. There's an option for you to continue if you watch an ad well if you click no there will still be an ad. Great game so nostalgic but they've destroyed it with ads

I remembered the fun I had back in the time when I used to play this a lot; but now everything changed for worse, I saw a review that said that now it has this Playstation 1 graphics, and I absolutely agree, the graphics do make me a little uncomfortable knowing that they used to be a lot better. Ads are really every time you end a run and they are unskippable most of the time. I also would say the best choice of words to describe the character's actions would be "not smooth".

I used to play this in 2013. But it didn't hit the same way before. Just run, tilt your phone to turn, swipe to jump, and swipe down to slide to the floor. And just because it's a mega hit classic, doesn't mean you'll put it on the title screen, it made the developers look so greedy, because of ads, Shop, and Alot of distractions for you to pay them. I never recommend this game.

It is a good game but every time I die there is a freaking ad. I just even closed my internet but still a freaking ad. I got just tired of the ads. Even the graphics look like a 91 years old game. Even local Indian games are better than this. It doesn't even follow my controls. When I swipe up it is it's own world just go straight. It is so bad that I could literally buy a PlayStation 1 to play much better games than this. And the man runs like a dead man trying to run. Never play this game
An advert after every run !! regardless if you choose not to continue run .. ruining the game, sort it out!

I hadn't played in years, but when I returned today, I found changes I did not like while ironically finding nothing added to the game itself. Resurrects are basically a useless purchase, as you can just use ads to advance now. The game is no longer a challenge with the ability to just jump back where you were after watching an ad. Overall I am not very happy with what I had seen.

I played this game several years ago. It was really, really fun then. Redownloaded for fun and now it's clogged with ads. You get an ad after every run, every objective, just everything. It's like they don't want you to play this game, just go play something else. To the developer I say boo! Bring back the old version. It had ads every now and then but this new one is ridiculous.

It's an ok game. It freezes from time to time. And the ads are relentless. After a run an ad pops up before your score shows up. What is up with that. Watching ads to get free boost on to continue a run is ok, but even after the game ends and you want to go back to the main menu, an ad pops up. Too much ads!!!

star_3.text: It's a pretty fun game, I started playing about 8-10 years ago when my daughter was playing it. I gave it three stars because about half the time when you try to watch an ad to go further, once the ad ends it takes you to the app store and when you get back it ends the run, making the fact you watched a whole ad for nothing. And since I bought the game, I don't really want to watch ads. So, if you fix that issue I'll gladly give you five stars.

I love temple run, I really do. I got a new phone and decided to install it, and was able to run it perfectly fine! But then I closed the app, and came back a bit later to play again. It just wouldn't run, it stayed frozen on the loading screen. I Uninstalled it and installed it again, and it worked again! But when I closed the app and tried to open it again, the same thing happened! Please fix this, its really agrivateing.

PROS- this is a game by which you can increase focus and attention. in this game you can switch your brain in different activities instantly. CONS- in my experience, always it does not work accurately according to I wanted to move.

It's entertaining game but as time passes, it gets boring; it's just getting fast, and same background. I miss the old "Temple Run" where there's zip line, woods rolling that you have to avoid, and fast flowing water in the river. It will be more fun and challenging to play. And I also remember, that there's different kinds of monsters that were chasing every start of the game. I don't have problem with the graphics, it's authentic, I just hope to bring the old, fun, and challenging Temple Run.

Pretty game with beautiful sceneries. Gives me Tomb Raider vibes. Harder than Temple Run 2. Doesn't have access to fun things like character selection on shop but it's fun regardless and very addicting. It's a nice simple game to kill your time I guess. But it gets 3 stars because of the constant advertising pop ups after every death. Very annoying. They could cut them atleast to two deaths an add or three, but oh well. And the things you can do in the game are very limited so.

Great game, but it seems to be worse than when I started playing it. There are more advertisements than before and a couple of bugs: occasionally after opening the app the first game will have very distorted sound, and after watching an ad to ressurect the character after dying the resurrection objective is not checked off! However aside from this I really enjoy playing the game and would recommend it.

A good game to pass time. Yes, the ads ruins the game, it keeps showing ads no matter I choose yes or no and ads hang or stop without any way to go to game except to get out of the game. Why ruins the good experience of this game? I've been playing this game for a long time, maybe 7 years. Previous ads were better, no hang or stop. Ads may be required for the developer but please do it better and sparingly.
This is very good game but when i die there is freaking adds i dont like the adds

I loved this game when I was 17, but now there are so many adverts it's disheartening. During my 20 minutes play I've had to sit through numerous adds of which the lengths vary from 15 to 30 seconds and sometimes the adds freeze and won't let you escape the page to return to the game so you have to swipe off and back on again to restart your game, it's a greedy way to make money from folk who are trying to have a good time with an old mobile classic, honestly I'd just buy the game if it had a £

Temple Run... Ahh the nostalgia back from 2011 playing this game is the best. It was was very popular wanted to experience that again . Although the game is still fun I do have a few problems with it though. To begin with the ads. I do understand ads are nessary for the game to make money . But unlike other games I know the ads in temple run are not optional and are shoved down the mouth. The game has to have ads optional than being played by force .

Overall ok. I enjoy playing the game but there are problems. The option to watch an ad to keep running is a joke. If I hit no I still have to watch an ad so I might as well watch it to keep running. Also, the objective of Resurrection cannot be achieved because of the option to watch an ad to keep running. There is no where to use it and the ad doesn't work for the objective.

I used to play this a lot when i was a kid and now that I'm back to it I find that it didn't age well, I understand it's a free game and the developers want to make ad revnue but do we really have to watch an advert after every run? it's overwhelming especially when you're raging, also the sharp turns are the trick that the devs use to rig their game with by putting sudden death traps like large chasms and obstacles to end the player's run and get us to watch their ads, it's not fun anymore.

Downloaded it because I wanted to play it again but it's nothing like the old version. I don't really have any problems with the ads since I can just turn off my data. But I think this game became too boring. At the start of the game before, there's going to be a rope. That's gone now. That's okay. But the longer I play, the more I see that it changed so much lol. The water, train, straight path, etc.. is gone now. It's just a constant running w/o new things ://. This feels like a big downgrade.

This is a good app, a nice concept, but there are way too many advertisements. You used to be able to buy a resserection for 500 coins, but now you can just watch an ad. And even when you say no to watching an ad to continue, it gives you an ad anyway. I would rate it higher if you remove the ads, or at least lessen them

Fun but falling through the sides when landing really takes out the joy of it when you can just die because the game decides it doesnt want to register the floor. Usually happens around the rocky terrain. Theres also the weird matter of obstacles immediately after each other which are impossible to as the time you land you run straight into your doom.

used to be my favorite game back in the day. now it's filled with ads. you die? ad. i never see the witty commentary about your deaths anymore because i close out of the game to avoid watching ads. ruins some of the charm for me. it's still fun to play, i just wish there were more options to watch ads like in the double your coins button rather than forcing you to watch an ad every time you die.

They could could add riding a tamed demon monkey. Also they should stop making us watch an ad after we die even if we don't want to watch it. Also, it keeps malfunctioning on me. When I want to jump, it kills me. It is absolutely annoying. Also, it would be fun if we could customize our characters. That would be cool. You could you the gold you get from running to get more features.Also you should start with a boy or girl starting character.It would bring in people.You would get more downloads

I like the idea. It's good, but unfortunately, it isnt executed well. The gameplay is difficult to understand. Everytime I accidentally tilt my phone, I crash, and everytime I attempt to collect coins, it doesnt correctly register. There are several ads, after each run, and it just isn't exciting enough to keep me occupied. If you enjoy a bit of a challenge involving hand control, I suppose this is for you, but it isnt for me. Thanks :)

The more expensive characters are less animated than the cheaper ones, even Guy Dangerous is more animated than the expensive characters. Also, the game is changed? Like, now the characters don't fall from the wooden path when I swipe without reaching a turn, or don't stumble when swiping without reaching a turn... This game is changed... No more what it used to be...

I downloaded it bc I was feeling nostalgic, and the game play itself was fine. It's just that there were so many ads. There was an ad at the end of every run, even if I didn't choose to watch a video to recover. The ads are also unskipable, there would be an x in the corner but nothing would happen when I would press it. There was no way for me to leave the ad. It was very frustrating

star_4.text: This game is a part of my childhood. I thought it was the best game to exist at one point (along with subway surfers). I just played a couple rounds, and I didn't know they added ads? 🤔 big mistake, it's kinda sad. Also the running space and obstacles look the same, which is good but I think the character look changed, but it might be because I haven't played this since I was four. Great game for when your bored, and no, Airplane mode didn't help the ads for me, Stacy. 😐 TREE HUGGER!

I missed this game, I haven't played it since I was 7! This game is really fun and is a great replacement for subway surfers. I really with there was an option for character customization though, that would be game changing. I have one slight issue though, I don't remember the audio quality being so bad.. I'm not sure if it's my phone but I definitely don't remember it sounding so crunchy..

Temple Run is still a fun and classic endless runner that’s great for killing time, with smooth gameplay and exciting challenges. However, the game would be even better if the developers improved the graphics, added more detailed visuals, updated animations, and introduced new characters or game modes to keep it fresh. Overall, it’s still enjoyable and worth playing, but there’s definitely room for improvement.
Good, there is a reason this game is so beloved. It is, however, full of ads, often very long ones.

it's a great game but it's sometimes annoying when you lag and after about 3 minutes it gets boring but hey owner I'm not saying it is bad it's fantastic. The way how you have to tilt your phone to move makes it F U N. Make another one. But make another game that's not like subway surfers. ⭐⭐⭐⭐◻️ stars
Old classic, but they are getting greedy now. Lots of ads.

It's a fun game really, I used to play it a lot during lockdown with my family... But it's a shame there are more ads now, I understand they have to add advertising, but it can be annoying when you die it asks you if you want to keep going (but you have to watch an ad) And if you press no it gives you an ad anyway, regardless, fun game, nice and hard, short ads atleast, Hope this helps x

This game is pretty fun, it is a classic. I remeber my friends playing it when I was in middle school, and the updates made the game more interesting, I'd give it 5 stars, but I remove one star because of the ads, when I played this game at middle school, I don't remember getting an ad every time I die. And even if I did get an ad, I only had to skip it once, not three times in a row. Pretty annoying if you ask me
it's too hard game to run endless at least 5 minutes it's over in 1 minute

This game is awesome. But I don't like one fact about it. Whenever I lose there are two options. Even when I don't want to want to see a video and I click cross, it always shows a video and goes to the main menu. It is quite irritating. And I always have to wait for messages so I cannot avoid it by clicking on no WiFi. Hope you can fix it.

Really great game, Just 3 small issues I have. 1. It looks like a PS2 game. 2. Sometimes the random terrain generation screws up and makes impossible slides or jumps. 3. The swipe mechanics could be slightly improved, sometimes it registers a wrong input making me miss a jump or turn, or just fails to register all together. But still... Its a great game, the last two thing only happen rarely. Also I do not understand the ad issue as on my device I get no ads, nor the ability to watch 1 to contin
Your game is great but everytime I die or get an ad it won't let me click the buttons please fix this problem it stopped me from playing
It's a endless game. It is full of adventures. This game is too good for childrens. You can download this game without any regret.👍🏻

Temple Run is a super fun game where you get to be an adventurer running through ancient temples! The graphics are cool, and you can collect coins and power-ups along the way. It's easy to play, but sometimes it gets a bit tricky, and I wish there were more characters to choose from. Overall, it's a great game to have fun and test your skills!

This game is really fun an amazing but the adverts are super annoying. Every time you die, you get an option to watch an ad to revive - but if you click no, you still get an ad anyway? Whats the point in clicking no then if you get one either way? Apart from this the game is really fun

Pretty dang fun game. First, the complaints 1. sometimes the game fricks up and spawns jumps that are impossible. .2. You have to turn the entire fricking device sideways to go OVER TO GET FRICKING COINS!!! And the last one 3. It costs a Frick-load of in-game currency to afford things, and the skins that you buy with the in-game currency DONT EVEN LOOK THAT FRICKING COOL!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! but on to the fun side. Pretty fun game. You start with gold coins, then red, then blue. So it's fun

This game has always been a part of my childhood. The only thing I'm thinking about is why did you guys added an ads system. I downloaded the game after, like, 8 years, and looks like there are many changes in the game,like, the running animation, the screen tilting, and before this update they had only 1 big monster chasing us, but now there are multiple but the most annoying thing is the screen tilt, because sometimes when I'm playing while laying, it keeps tilting to only to one side, thanks.

Love this game very much. I like temple run more than the second one, Temple Run 2. That's because the first one looks simple but yet challenging. I hope there will have more update on this game. I play Temple run very frequent because it tests my reflexes and i got a lot of coins but don't know what to do with those coins. Perhaps, create more purchasable item in store will make it more fun such as special ability for character, costume, more objectives and achievements.

The reason I only give it 4 stars and not 5 is because the constant advertisements. Other than that I think this is a great game and I have a lot of fun playing it. If you are annoyed to much by the advertisements in this game then you should see how many advertisements are in Dragon City. In that game you are always prompted to by something. So I think Temple Run is an awesome free game.

The game itself is amazing, but there are too many ads. I think watching an ad to resurrect or to double the earned coins is great, I use it almost all the time. However, what annoys me the most is that when you die it asks if you want to watch an ad to resurrect, but even if you click no then you have to watch one anyways.

star_5.text: I love this game. Used too play it every day as a kid. It's such a fast paced fun experience. It is a little annoying that they added ads but I still love it. The description of the deaths make me laugh every time even when I was THIS CLOSE to getting a high score. Over all a 9/10 game because of the ads. It used to be a 10/10 but now there are ads. Review Edit:I figured out a way to get rid of the ads. Just turn your wifi off. Now it's a 10/10 game. 😁 I started playing again yesterday. Love it

This game is VERY GOOD! To explain why, its because of the amazing fast paced gameplay. At the start of a run it feels slow but after some time your character picks up the pace. Lots of replay value in this all time classic! The fact that there are now ads when you finish a run are frustrating. But it keeps the game alive and is definitely worth is when you get another HIGH SCORE. Its consistently good and even though the path generation is sometimes unfair Im always wanting to play again! 9/10

Massively Fun... Massively Addictive... Massively Challenging. This would even make a good party game. Pass the phone around and see who can get the highest score, the longest run, the most coins... whatever you want the challenge to be. This game is fun. If you have games on your phone, this is a 'Must Buy'. Yes, it does have ADS but one 'No Ads' purchase of around $5 and you're good as gold. Worth it!

Amazing I love it. A lot of people complain about the ads but don't care for their review because they don't know airplane mode exists. Super amazing tons of different things you can do. I highly recommend it. You can use tons of different characters. And upgrade them. Plus you can change the coin look. As I said before I highly recommend it to others. P.S. some of the ads show cool games so you can get other cool games. But they won't be as good as this one. I also will say this about part 2!

this is a fun and engaging game with tons of challenges, twists and turns. If you play this game, you will definitely get better at similar games like subway surfers, but you'll be to addicted to temple run for that. I mean, my phone's at 4% right now!

good game it reminds me of my childhood I'm 12 now and I miss my old days I wish they could come back this is the best game just remove some ads they annoy very much thanks imangi studios for such a nice game

this is the best game from the start 😄 Even when I was 7 years old I like to play this game that means it is safe for kids , younger, adults, and old agers. In my opinion this game is the memory of my childhood 😭😭......

This is game is one of my fav games ever .It's the best game ever and if you just ad a little touch to it cause when you run you can't run that far and you get tired so i thought maybe you can stop somewhere and then he sits down and eat and drink water and you have to have day's so he can go to sleep and build a campfire and his own tent and a hiding spot with armory and security to be safe make like he can attack the thing .
